column1: Fast and Furious：Deliveryman’s Comeback
column4: Truck driver Jack Harrison enters the high-stakes racing world to save his former lover Lily's struggling team. After crushing fierce rivals to become a newly crowned racing god, his son Ethan is kidnapped by Ironclad Enterprises. Jack wins a rigged VR tournament to rescue him, fully exposing his legendary identity. Despite his estranged father's plea to inherit an elite racing empire, Jack ultimately chooses a quiet delivery life to protect his family.

column1: The Worthless Joker
column4: My name is Caelen. I was like a stray dog who sold myself to Lady Portia. There was one rule to our agreement, that I must pretend to be deaf and mute. I kept up the act and became her legal husband. Everything changed when I learned that my wife had been into women all along!

column1: Blind Eyes, Open Heart
column4:
Blinded by a lab accident, Iris thinks her husband is caring for her.
Once her sight returns, she learns it was her cold professor all along — while her husband and best friend cheat openly right beside her.
Pretending to stay blind, she watches their dirty secrets unfold. Between lies, hidden feelings and unexpected closeness with the professor, a risky game of betrayal begins.

column1: Famine? Here Comes the Fishing Tyrant!
column4: Starving and beaten, a transmigrator awakens a Fishing System. He hooks weapons, allies, and justice from impossible waters. One by one, he pulls bandits, corrupt lords, and a rebel king from their thrones. The starving boy who once had nothing becomes the marquis. But when a man feeds an empire, can he ever stop fishing for more?

column1: How to Tame My Devil Slaves
column4: Shirley wakes up as Lilith, a doomed villainess in the otome game Demon Butlers. Her mission: turn the bloodlust of her four demon butlers into obsessive devotion—or die. She heals one with her blood and awakens Yegard, the deadliest demon, to survive a rigged Demon Control Trial. Ambushed and alone, can she tame her monsters and rewrite her fate before it's too late……

column1: Too Late To Save Our Baby
column4: After multiple IVF treatments, she finally gets pregnant, but is injured by her husband's ex's child. Her ruthless husband ignores her cries for help, treating the kid's minor bruises instead, causing her to lose their baby! Heartbroken by his betrayals, she exposes his toxic lies, slaps them in public, and walks away forever.

column1: She Suffered, He Slept, Now They Pay
column4: A woman marries her dying love's cruel brother to harvest cord blood. She endures abuse, loses a baby, and nearly breaks. When her true love wakes and learns the truth, he doesn't heal, he hunts. The monsters who hurt her are about to meet a man who's been dying to protect her.

column1: Watch Out, I'm Your Landlord Now!
column4: She was their free maid, beaten and betrayed. When her son smashed her late husband's jade, she snapped. She sold the house, moved into luxury, and hired top lawyers. The new landlord kicked the door in. Now she's freezing their accounts and suing for everything. When the doormat becomes the wrecking ball, who will be left begging in the rubble?

column1: My Hobo Husband is Zeus
column4: At the peak of Olympus, Asteria is brutally murdered by her jealous sister, Medea, who envies her marriage to Ares, the God of War. Dying, Medea sacrifices her Titan blood to the Fates, forcing a time reset.

column1: The Demon System Made Me King
column4: After a divine apocalypse wipes out countless gods, the heavens create Paradise Isle to recruit chosen humans and forge new deities. Ye Yun enters the trial determined to ascend. Instead, he awakens a forbidden Demon System. What will he become in the end?

column1: I Let My Foster Father Die
column4: Hungry for high society, Maya Nolan abandons her roots to please billionaire Ethan Shaw. But a chance comment hints at a deadly secret, and the reunion banquet turns into a battlefield of accusations and shattered facades. As power and loyalty collide, Maya faces a reckoning. When fortune fades, what makes a family?

column1: Oh No! I Dumped the Princess?
column4: Nathan is a street vendor who saves Sarah, a powerful businesswoman. She desperately grabs him to pose as her boyfriend, and they end up having a flash wedding that same night to escape her pursuer. The next day, a deadly conflict erupts when her enemy kidnaps members of her organization. Will their fake marriage turn real?

column1: Love, Lies and a Deadly Ex
column4: At the engagement party, Wendy Sterling publicly rejected her long-time boyfriend and fiancé, Charles Grant, and turned to the arms of her returned first love, Evan Blake. Yet when she finally sees Evan's true colors and wants to turn back, will Charles give her another chance? And what is the final outcome?

column1: The Husband Swap Game
column4: When Lyra feigns amnesia to test her husband Marcus, he ruthlessly hands her off to his brother, Ethan, claiming he's her true spouse. Lyra then uncovers Marcus’s seven-year double life of S&M and infidelity with her best friend. Caught between a fake husband with a real heart and a real husband with a fake soul, the twisted "Husband Swap" begins.

column1: (Dubbed) Mama Bear Mode
column4: When Chloe faces relentless bullying at school, her mother, Eleanor, rises up to protect her. Unmasking lies, crushing false claims, and shattering deceit, Eleanor activates Bear Mode, and justice will be served — and no one escapes the consequences. She fights. She protects. She conquers — all for her child.

column1: (Dubbed) Reborn as a 5-Year-Old Doomsday Queen
column4: Trapped in an ancient disaster system, a modern woman awakens as a five-year-old girl. To win one hundred billion and return to reality, she must lead her family through famine, plague, cold, and chaos. But as lives are saved and bonds grow, leaving may not be so easy...

column1: My Disciple... or Something More?
column4: After two lifetimes as an unruly immortal, Yun Ping realizes that raising a female disciple is far more interesting. But his lively new disciple seems to share a mysterious connection with his wife from a past life...

column1: My Broke Bodyguard is a Billionaire?
column4: In her past life, Yoojung was murdered by her younger sister, who coveted the wealth Yoojung had married into. Reborn, she's set up with Kang Jaehyuk, the family "beggar", while her sister steals the billionaire brother-in-law. But the "beggar's" true identity? Heir to the LY Group. This time, she chooses the fake pauper over the gilded cage, unaware she's found a love worth dying for. But when the truth surfaces, what challenges will they face together?

column1: A restaurant owner? The queen!
column4: After renouncing her crown, Nora Bauer built a peaceful life with her daughter, Grace. That peace is destroyed when the vengeful noble Mahesh orchestrates Grace's humiliation and kidnapping. Fueled by fury, Nora walks into his trap. What horrors await her now?

column1: You Chose Her? Now Watch Me Rise!
column4: Three years of marriage, Jiang Sui still can't win Yu Jinchen's heart. When his first love frames her and he demands the unthinkable, Jiang Sui finally lets go. He thinks she'll fall apart. Instead, she returns as a rich heiress. When their paths cross again, Yu Jinchen realizes too late what he has lost... but is it already beyond repair?

column1: Live: My Ex-Husband's Secrets
column4: On her anniversary, Vera's husband brings home his mistress and kicks her out with nothing. That night, she goes live auctioning her ex husband's secrets. Now his empire is crashing and he's begging. But Vera's not done. The final item? You won't believe it.

column1: Bye, Jerk! I'm the Boss Lady!
column4: A hidden billionaire father returns in secret. His daughter prepares to announce her engagement. But her fiancé is cheating and humiliates the quiet old man, unaware he is the true power behind the company. An heirloom shattered. A lie exposed. When she sees everything… who will pay the price?

column1: Reborn to Destroy My Family
column4: After being killed by her husband and fake sister, CEO Lila gets reborn. She stops enduring, hides her plan, cuts off their resources, and waits for the perfect time. Watch the female CEO take her brutal revenge and send her toxic family straight to hell…

column1: Blind? He's one of a kind!
column4: Brian Wilson, who used to be the No.1 agent in the world, is now running a Blind Massage Parlor with his wife, Tracy Swift. However, Hades of the Specture hunts for them and they are in great danger. After years in hiding, does he still have his peak skills? Can he really let go of his past and live in peace again?
column5: ['Return of the King', 'Multiple Identities', 'Good vs. Evil']

column1: Hey! I Was Their Savior, Not Their Maid!
column4: Melody Hill, heir to a financial empire, sacrificed five years to save the man she loved. She rebuilt a broken family, only to be treated like a servant and forgotten. Now, as her contract ends, she's taking everything back. When the truth emerges, will the man who owes her everything lose it all?

column1: Finish Line, Dead End
column4: Eighteen years ago, Sarah Lincoln saved Harrison Flores from a fire. He never forgot her—but he mistook Eileen Black for her. He helped Eileen hurt Sarah again and again. By the time Harrison uncovered the truth, she was already blazing bright beyond his reach. Will they ever find their way back to each other?

column1: Huh? This VET Saves HUMANS?
column4: Cast out by her family, Wendy Scott mastered the healing arts. Upon her return, she's strong-armed into marrying Julian Baker of the powerful Baker Family. She accepts, intrigued by his illness. But will this union save him, or plunge her deeper into a world of elite conflict?

column1: The Heiress He Threw Away
column4: Hidden heiress. Betrayed lover. Three powerful brothers. She saved a broke man and built him from nothing. He repaid her by throwing her out for a fake. What he never knew? She was the real one all along. Now she's back… and this time, who will beg?

column1: Try Stopping Me? Good Luck
column4: Thalia, a determined girl from humble roots, exploits a wealthy playboy’s bet to chase her dreams. Years later, she returns with power and ambition, facing old rivals and deadly schemes. Can she outsmart the forces that once tried to crush her, or will the past catch up?

column1: Engagement Off, Now He’s Proposing?
column4: Jeff Foster, the heir to the Foster Family, hired Elara, who bore a striking resemblance to his fiancée, Vivian Thorne, to call off the engagement. But he ended up falling for the fake, Elara... Will Jeff truly be able to break off the engagement? What happened next?

column1: Six Years Later Twins Find Their Mother
column4: Six years ago, Elena Turner was betrayed and left pregnant with Dragon Lord Adrian Drake's twins. She raised Nina alone while he took May to the Dragon Clan. Now Elena must find Adrian to save Nina's life. But when the twins switch places, misunderstandings explode! Can two children bring their parents together before secrets destroy everything?

column1: He Chose Her Tears, Now Begs for Mine
column4: Summer Sheng’s life shattered in the wreckage, but her husband turned away, abandoning her to lose their child. He crushed her career, elevated his mistress. That was her awakening. On her wedding day, he watched her pledge herself to another. Now, he will stop at nothing to claim her back. But will his obsession reignite her frozen heart, or bury it forever?

column1: Contract Ends, Romance Begins
column4: After two months in the hospital with no visit from her husband Thomas, Fiona realized their marriage was a sham. She kicked out the nanny, adopted a cat, and returned to work as a designer. She became the company's top performer, transformed into someone Thomas no longer recognized...

column1: Before the Wedding, Comes the Reckoning
column4: Wedding eve, fire alarm at the new house—he catches his fiancée in bed with her stepbrother! She calls it sibling love, hickeys all over, acting like nothing’s wrong. All the years she hurt him for her stepbrother, he’d hoped marriage would fix it… but now he’s done. He swaps her for the arranged bride—this wedding’s still on, just not with the cheating liar!

column1: My Son Wanted to Steal My Kidney For Power
column4: At 49, Mia kept her promise to her first love and never married. But her ungrateful adopted son and his cruel wife faked her kidney disease, planning to cut her open and give her kidney to his mother-in-law for money and power. Her first love Jason, now the richest man in the country, finally found her. He will burn everything to avenge her… and the evil son will beg for death!

column1: (Dubbed)No More Mr. Nobody
column4: Julian hid his name, his power, and his fury for five years, playing the useless husband no one respected. When betrayal and a child’s lie push his marriage to the edge, he stops pretending. As the true mastermind behind a life-saving medical project returns to claim his throne, Julian’s revenge begins. Will the woman he loved recognize him before it’s too late?

column1: Too Late, Dad! I Want Her!
column4: Debt. Power. A forbidden attraction. A bartender falls into a powerful man's trap to repay what she owes. Becoming his woman wasn't the plan… until his son returns. Caught between father and son, she becomes the line neither should cross. Desire… or a war she can't survive?

column1: (Dubbed) Got X-Ray Vision? Try Treasure Empire!
column4: Mia gains X-ray vision from a magic stone by accident, transforming from an ordinary worker into a legend. She masters Stone Gambling, confronts rivals, and hunts for five Magic Stones to unlock skills. With allies, she restores national treasures and takes on the gang, reaching the top of antique world, but her greatest achievement is yet to come.

column1: No Home for Old Men: The CEO's Redemption
column4: At her grandfather's funeral, Apex Group President Bella is suddenly confronted by two men who barge in with their father's body, accusing a reputable senior home she funded of causing his death. Unwilling to believe it, Bella goes undercover as a caregiver to uncover the truth, only to discover a dark secret that shatters her world...

column1: A Heart Unknown
column4: Wrongfully imprisoned, General Ivan Wiley shared one night with Cali Boyd before his name was cleared. Eight years later, a desperate mother arrived in the Northwest with her two children, seeking the man who could save her sick son. But when she finally found him, he couldn't recognize her. Could the kids truly be his own?

column1: The Immortal Magician
column4: Cultivator Charles Lowery descended the mountains to wed his fiancée. Bound to hide his powers, he live-streamed immortal arts as "magic". Millions were stunned. Then, he was invited to a TV contest. Had he truly fooled the world?

column1: Get Lost! Bro-Obsessed Leech!
column4: Betrayed by his wife Yvonne Jones and her family, Charles Martin lost everything and was killed. But after an unexpected rebirth, he vows to make them pay. How will he exact his revenge?

column1: He Loves the Girl in Painting!
column4: Lydia Davis observed that her husband, Frank Young, had developed an obsession with a painting, his behavior turning increasingly peculiar by the day. Then, one day... what astonishing secret did she stumble upon?

column1: (Dubbed) Don't Mess With the Genius Heiress
column4: Genius Eve Cole was framed and broken in the asylum. Betrayed again by her family, she finally breaks free. At a grand ceremony, she exposes her sister’s lies, reveals her own brilliance, and leaves her regretful family behind forever.

column1: What, A 3,000-Year-Old Loser?
column4: Giles Baker is the grand founding patriarch of the Azure Abyss Sword Sect. For three thousand years, he remained stuck in the Energy Refining Stage, unable to establish his Foundation. Time to find some gifted ladies, for dual cultivation might just do the trick. Will he get to build his Foundation in the end?

column1: Bad Boy Begs for Her Love Again
column4: After catching her fiancé cheating, Olivia was in a car accident that changed her life forever. Saved by Mrs.Blake, she rose to become Vice President of The Blake Group. When the reckless heir Ethan saw Olivia at the company, he wanted her immediately. She resisted and he chased harder. With Mrs.Blake’s help, Ethan and Olivia got married and began a chaotic life...

column1: From Zero to Sword God
column4: Disgraced "Kirin Prodigy" Aaron Stern, unable to contract a Sword Spirit, binds the cursed Ruby, one of the four Magic Swords, and awakens the Aegis System. With the Voidborn Cataclysm looming, he rises from waste to Sword God. But just as he prepares to face the disaster, he realizes the Voidborn is...

column1: Flash Marriage Turns Out Right!
column4: To dodge an arranged marriage, Cecilia Carter and Jeffrey Jones tie the knot after a chance encounter at a matchmaking event. Afterward, Jeffrey goes undercover at her company, forcing Cecilia to keep her true identity... Can their secrets be kept from each other?

column1: My Blind Contract Husband Is So Sweet
column4: After waking up as Miss Reed of Aster City, Avy Reed faces a huge penalty for dumping blind tycoon Vance Gray. She tears up the breakup letter and marries him instead. Though he appears cold and distant, Vance has actually regained his sight and pretends to be blind to stay close to Avy, protecting her from rivals. Avy turns her business around and finally wins his heart.

column1: I Time-Traveled for Power! Not 108 Children!
column4: Elara Voss accidentally time-traveled into a novel as a character who dies right after appearing. She wants to rewrite her destiny, not to have 108 Serpent Clan children. Will she be able to pull those twists and turns?

column1: (Dubbed) Reborn Wraith: Fake Heiress Must Die!
column4: Betrayed and abandoned by her own family, she kills herself in the end. As a vengeful soul, she manages to maker her family pay while looking for her lover in the mortal world. One day, she is reborn through a mysterious pact with a dying girl named Clara Hayes... Can she help Clara's wish come true, and will she find the man in the end?

column1: From Tomb Keeper to Warrior King!
column4: Prince Chen Mo is sent away to guard the royal tombs. He activates a powerful system and learns amazing skills. At this time, the old emperor dies. The royal family fights each other. Enemies attack the kingdom. Chen Mo's fiancée, Luo Qingxue, leads the army to defend the capital. At the last moment, Chen Mo appears. What will happen to them?

column1: His Betrayal, My Rise
column4: Nora Wilson goes into labor alone while her husband, Leon Walker, is busy comforting another woman. When she catches his betrayal, her world shatters. After a tragic miscarriage and a cruel scheme to steal her embryo, Nora fights back. At the company’s bell-ringing ceremony, she exposes the truth. But who is the real father of her child?

column1: Honey, I Can Read Your Mind!
column4: A mistreated girl becomes pregnant after a one-night encounter with a wealthy heir… only for him to fall into a coma. When his powerful family wants the baby but not the mother, she discovers a deadly plot through her ability to hear thoughts. Now she must play smart, and turn the game around. How far will she go to survive?

column1: The Seventh Winter Without You
column4: In senior year, Chloe Shaw's world collapses. Shane Miles, a delivery boy lights her world. They promise to go to the same city for college. However, lies, greed, and violence tear them apart at the airport. Chloe stays behind, alone. Seven years later, when them meet again, what will happen to them?

column1: Karma's Coming, Stepmother!
column4: Celia Lane, the heiress to a warlord, was murdered by her stepmother Chloe, stepsister Mandy, and fiancé Silas. Upon her rebirth, she discovers her mother was also killed by her stepmother. Now she vows to avenge her mother and make them pay in blood. Will she succeed?

column1: Drive to Survive: The CEO Edition
column4: A retired fighter turned cab driver just wanted a quiet life... until he saves a powerful CEO. Now she's the city's top target because of a revolutionary AI chip. He becomes her only bodyguard. She doubts him. Enemies close in. Is this just a job... or the start of something deadly?

column1: Too Late for Your Regrets, Husband and Son!
column4: Fanny and Philip had loved each other for years. After marriage, they built a family that everyone envied. But by chance, Fanny discovered the shocking reality beneath the surface. Her husband was cheating, and her son identified the mistress as Mom. Everything became unfamiliar, as if she no longer recognized the world around her...

column1: She Banished Her War Hero
column4: War Hero General Marcus bound to young Empress Emma by twelve royal pardons… twelve chances to forgive her mistakes. As he wins wars and the people's hearts, she fears his power and strips his command at victory's edge. One pardon after another is spent… until none remain. With enemies at the gates, will pride destroy her empire?

column1: Wife And Son Can Break A King!
column4: Ryan Wells gave up ambition for love, choosing marriage over empire. But when Lena's first love comes back, cracks spread through their family, and Ryan reaches his breaking point. This time, he won't walk away quietly. When the truth comes out, will regret be enough to change her fate?

column1: Magic Eyes Make Me King of Containers!
column4: A dockworker's fate changes when a broken relic awakens a sight that sees value where others see scrap. But as new vision brings new dangers—rival syndicates, hidden treasures, and a powerful romance... can he navigate a world where every opportunity has a price? This isn't just a rags-to-riches story... it's life with cheat codes enabled.

column1: I Want My New Stepmom To Be My Woman!
column4: Kael and Clara were childhood sweethearts, ready to marry. But his father forced Clara to marry him instead, making her Kael’s stepmother. After his father died on their wedding night, he locked Clara in the penthouse while seeing Ivy. When Ivy found out Clara was pregnant, she humiliated her violently. Will Kael choose to protect Clara?

column1: From Bar Girl to Pregnant Cinderella
column4: Elsie Kent, a rural migrant, needs to cover stolen company funds. She sells drinks at a bar, meets a rich man from the capital, and has a one-night stand. A month later, she's pregnant. What will happen next?

column1: Broke Diver? Now I Own the Ocean!
column4: Broke diver? Dylan Briggs accidentally gains the "Oceanic Oracle" power! Now he sees every sunken secret and hidden gold mine beneath the waves of Zandora. From seizing billion dollar relics to crushing the ruthless Silas Vance, Dylan builds a massive empire with Serena Roth. Will he rule the oceans or sink into the abyss?

column1: Oh Nice! I Married the Mad Devil!
column4: Nina Reed watched her mother die in a fire, orchestrated by her father and stepmother. Years later, her stepsister tricks Nina into marrying the feared Ethan Tate. But Nina chose this. Inside his world, two broken souls form a dangerous alliance. When her stepfamily realizes who she truly married, will they survive what's coming?

column1: Shifting Hearts
column4: Merchant's daughter Clara Lawson marries into the Howe Marquisate but faces cold neglect. Two years pass without intimacy. When her husband's brother suddenly dies and he rushes to marry his late brother's widow, Clara decides it's time to change husbands... but will her plan succeed?

column1: Three Brides to Save My Life
column4:
He was one step from immortality… until he was cursed to marry three women or die. Thrown into the mortal world, he wakes up married to an ice-cold CEO and straight into a vicious corporate war. Love is chaos. Enemies are circling. And the other fiancées are coming.
Love is chaos.
Enemies are closing in.
And the other fiancées… are already on their way.

column1: Fleeting Fire, Lasting Scars
column4: Gina's world shatters at her husband's new bar when his mistress, Camille, publicly assaults her and her mother-in-law, even flaunting Gina's own heirloom watch. Betrayed by Brandi's indifference, Gina finds rescue in Ryan Steed. Forging her own path, she rises as a celebrated designer, while Brandi's crimes lead to prison, leaving Camille with nothing.

column1: She Serves? She Rules!
column4: Fiona Bennett, chairman of the Bennett Group, secretly visits her Kindness Cafe. Vivian Clark insults Fiona because Fiona finds out her secret of profiteering in the cafe and her affairs. Fiona tries to collect all the evidence and expose them. Can Vivian still be married into the Winston Family? Does Fiona succeed? Does Fiona make Vivian pay the price?

column1: My Ugly Face
column4: Born with a rare disease, the young heiress gives everything to the boy she trusts. When her parents die, she discovers his cruel betrayal. He steals her identity and fortune, pretending to be the rightful heir. She leaves to grow stronger abroad. Five years later, he hosts a banquet to take her family’s empire… and she returns to expose him..

column1: Marry My Dad? Pure Fantasy!
column4: Chloe Scott kept a low profile when she returned home, but was mistaken for a mistress and humiliated by her stepmother, Shirley Foster, nearly losing her life. Did she eventually fight back?

column1: That Impostor, in My Three Uncles' Arms
column4: Emma’s death leaves her dying daughter, Joey, alone. An impostor steals her identity, leaving Joey to suffer as a mistreated orphan under her own uncles' roof. After being framed, Joey cuts ties and finds refuge with her mother’s friend, Jessica. When the truth emerges, the uncles' desperate pleas for mercy meet only Joey’s icy silence.

column1: (Dubbed) Her Justice Has No Mercy
column4: Susan returns to her hometown believing her charity has given the elderly a safe haven. Instead she finds whispers of bruises, vanished funds, terrified residents. She hides her identity, steps inside the shadows and discovers someone using her name for something far worse. If this is only the surface… what lies underneath?

column1: (Dubbed) The Emperor's Double Life
column4: Einst stürzte Nachtkaiser Karl Schmidt sechs Länder in den Abgrund. Nach dem Verrat und dem Tod seiner Frau zog er sich zurück, um seine Töchter in der Anonymität eines Arbeiters großzuziehen. Doch als ein Lohnstreit ihn in eine tödliche Verschwörung zieht, muss der legendäre Nachtkaiser zurückkehren.

column1: The Comeback Queen
column4: Once a world champion, Chloe Sanders vanished after refusing a fixed match and losing everything. Now she hides in a small-town tennis hall while her daughter Elsa chases a miracle. When a ruthless challenger unleashes a deadly serve from the past, one familiar move exposes her. But who has been waiting for her return all along?

column1: Lace Game with the CEO
column4: Struggling lingerie designer Grace takes a high-paying BDSM contract with Chris to save her sister’s life, after a misunderstanding leads to intimate testing. As she enters this secret world, her talent and complicated bond with Chris grow.

column1: Fading Vet? Wife-Taking System Rises!
column4: Finn Rowe, a dying 75-year-old veteran in Great Chou, awakens the Wife-Taking System via his scheming daughter-in-law’s young wife, marrying wives reverses aging and grants strength. He subdues his family, tames the army and outshines scholars; as Great Chou falls, he rises... Will he be the founding emperor?

column1: Ready for a show? Cue the Mama Lawyer!
column4: Lawyer Erin Lewis returns home to a furious neighbor, Flora Scott, accusing her dog Kevin of harming Flora’s daughter. Amid flashing cameras and whispers, Erin stays calm, sensing a hidden plot. Beneath polite compliance, she quietly prepares a counterstrike, waiting to expose the unseen hands behind the scheme.

column1: Want My Fortune? You Just Lost it!
column4: Upon returning home to visit her son, Helen Lynn had her jade bracelet smashed by her future daughter-in-law Monica Smith, only to be falsely accused and humiliated. Helen silently vowed to stop Monica from marrying her son. In the end, did Helen succeed?

column1: (Dubbed) Ready for a show? Cue the Mama Lawyer!
column4: Lawyer Erin Lewis returns home to a furious neighbor, Flora Scott, accusing her dog Kevin of harming Flora’s daughter. Amid flashing cameras and whispers, Erin stays calm, sensing a hidden plot. Beneath polite compliance, she quietly prepares a counterstrike, waiting to expose the unseen hands behind the scheme.

column1: Scalpels Here, Kisses There
column4: Lauren wants a baby for her husband. She has risky surgery, not knowing her husband is cheating with the anesthesiologist, Chloe. Chloe gives her the wrong drugs on purpose. Lauren’s first love, heart doctor Jensen, comes back just in time to save her. They find out the truth. What will they do? And what happens next between Lauren and her first love?

column1: (Dubbed)Where Past Fades, Love Departs
column4: After dying from betrayal, Mary is reborn on the day she's chosen to marry into the Holt family. She soon realizes her husband is also reborn. Choosing to leave, she's still targeted by schemes meant to ruin her. When Tom extends a partnership offer, Mary accepts, using her past-life experience to help build his company into an empire...

column1: Hunting a Demon? Captivating My CEO!
column4: Zella, CEO by day, was once a fox spirit who evaded a mage’s seal. Skye, a student with ancient eyes, is that mage reborn. When he whispers, “Your gaze holds a hollow ache,” centuries of memory stir. Now, in glass towers, a new hunt begins… One of longing, not capture. Will she flee again, or finally let his love bind her?

column1: (Dubbed) My Three Women Just Buff Me!
column4: Marcus, a modern engineer reborn as a veteran in a war-torn era, binds with a Cheat Menu System. Sheltering three ladies under a state-mandated marriage, he uses gadgets to build a home overnight and tackle local threats. But deadly enemies and danger are still lurching around… Can he protect his new family when the challenge begins?

column1: The Transfer Student's Move? Not on His Watch
column4: In senior year, Selena gathers courage to approach the seemingly cold Ethan. Awkward confessions, secret tutoring, and a bold new rival stir hearts and tensions. As quiet protection turns into unexpected action, will Selena’s feelings reach him in time?

column1: (Dubbed)Seduction Game: Uncle Always Won
column4: Wendy White, a fallen heiress, is forced into an engagement with playboy Xavier Ford. Desperate to escape, she sets her sights on his uncle Sean Ford, the real power behind Ford Group. She believes she's carefully manipulating the cold CEO into her trap. But what if he recognized her as his long-lost savior from the very beginning?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Karma Payback']

column1: That’s the Apocalypse… Twice!
column4: Betrayed and left to die in Earth's final moment, Anthony is reborn one month before the apocalyptic meteor strike. Now allied with a powerful family, he prepares while the world scoffs. But when the sky falls, a burning question arises: in this new life, will he seek vengeance against those who betrayed him, or forge a new destiny among the stars with peace?

column1: (Dubbed) Her Radiance, His Path
column4: Alisa, an antique restorer, transmigrated into a novel as an impostor princess destined to die by the tyrant Donis's sword. To survive, she must navigate his dangerous affection, a facade masking deep hatred. As she cleverly averts each deadly crisis, she unexpectedly captivates him, mending his broken past and warming his lonely heart.

column1: Careful, the Debt Is Paid!
column4: For three years, Leon served a petty master to honor a debt. Now, hailed as a lord before the entire martial world, he is summoned like a dog and publicly shamed by a girl. As the final insult lands… his three years of obligation expire. The alliance just witnessed their lord's humiliation. What will they do when he finally stops holding back?

column1: Reborn to Ruin Them All
column4: Reborn into a female-lead fantasy, only to end up as the villain destined to die? Framed by weaklings, hunted by “chosen ones,” he fights back with brutal cultivation and zero morals. Cross him once, and your whole clan pays. Villains don’t play fair.

column1: My Fake Husband Isn't Faking It!
column4: Betrayed by her fiancé, Chloe saves a stranger offering 1M dollars for a contract marriage! She becomes the fake wife of Sebastian Sterling, a "crazy" billionaire heir. Together, they punish their enemies, but Sebastian's act feels too real. He is possessive, clingy, and obsessed... Did she sign a business deal or find true love?

column1: Love Intertwined with Hate
column4: Emma, the daughter of Daniel's Residence, was driven out of the house on the day when her mother died. The Prime Minister Lucas saved her.  His fiancee Ava, Emma's half-sister, is not willing to marry him because of his leg disability. Emma loves him and takes care of him as a maid. But all he wants is Ava...

column1: From Leftover Bride To Billionaire's Wife!
column4: Jenny Gibson discovers her fiancé's affair with her stepsister just before the wedding. Determined to get revenge, she proposes a contractual marriage to Conrad Shane. How will she carry out her revenge? And what is even more unexpected is that they actually develop feelings for each other. What will their ending be?

column1: No More Loser, It's Celestial Master Now!
column4: Once a despised good-for-nothing, he now returns reborn with the memories of an Immortal with 5,000-year cultivation...

column1: A Beggar? No, He's A Legend!
column4: Once a noble, Lawrence fell to beggary. Near death, his hidden powers awaken. Reborn as a righteous thief, he punishes the corrupt, explores tombs, and redeems the courtesan Rosalind. He later serves the Emperor by retrieving a national treasure and quelling rebellion. Rising from a beggar to a legend, Lawrence carves his path with wit and justice… But what ultimate price must he pay?

column1: Got A CEO Wife and A Cute Girl
column4: Once an elite student, Leo's life shatters after one impulsive act. An accident, a powerful CEO, and a chance rescue drag him into a web of lies and ruthless ambition. Betrayal closes in as survival turns into defiance. When fate cornered him, did it make a mistake... or create something unstoppable?

column1: The Guardian: Human VS Demon
column4: Ashton guarded Demon Pass for 300 years, keeping demons from invading Sunland. But the kingdom accused him of exaggerating the demon threat and exiled him. Without his power, demons swarmed through the gates, and Sunland descended into chaos. But Ashton had already left to protect Lawland instead. Will Sunland survive its own arrogance?

column1: Oh Yeah! Crazy Cashback, Crazier Girls
column4: Released from prison and betrayed by his ex-wife, Caleb Hart nearly dies until a magic rune awakens the Tenfold Cashback System. With money multiplying and grudges settling, Caleb learns one thing fast: nothing beats a slap in the enemy's face.

column1: Reborn: Elixir Lord's Revenge
column4: Reborn Renee wields Chaosflame Core and supreme elixir arts to avenge her clan. Allying with frost-cursed Lord Shaw, she bonds with him, triumphs in the Grand Elixir Tournament, and foils dark plots to claim the Elixir Lord's Edict. Will hidden perils end her glory and love?

column1: Mr. Cupid in Rags' Payback
column4: Mr. Cupid descends as a beggar and weds Hazel Zane. Her family scorns them, forcing her to remarry. At a feast, he brings divine gifts but is mocked. Only when he reveals his power do they see the immortal they wronged.

column1: Yeah, Bye! I Don't Care!
column4: A billionaire heir died for the woman he made a business tycoon... only to be betrayed and thrown away at the top. Reborn with a second chance, he walks away from her for good. But she comes back too, certain she can still win everything. Except this time... he's no longer hers. When the man you discarded stops looking back... what do you do?

column1: In Love With My Bestie's Son
column4: Grieving her husband’s infidelity, Kate shares a night with a mysterious painter, who is famed prodigy CH Skywalker and her best friend’s son. With enemies set to reveal their secret, she faces ruin, lost friendship, and an agonizing choice about her forbidden romance.

column1: Warrior's Awakening: Fight For Love & Justice!
column4: Beck Lee’s father, Zane Lee, was framed as a demonic cultivator and hunted down by three great sects. Burning his own life-force for vengeance, Beck uncovers the truth, that the ‘righteous’ elders have themselves fallen into demonic ways. Severely wounded and on the run, he encounters Ann Sullivan. Will he survive?

column1: My Destined Candle Dragon
column4: Eric transmigrated, mocked as a useless Barbecue Master in a world of classes. His hidden Dragon Tamer class seemed a joke until he hatched Candle, a proud Candle Dragon. From slaying an S-rank boss to crushing evil conspiracies, their bond defied all limits. Ascending to godhood, Eric and Candle now stand guard over the world...

column1: A heartbeat away
column4: Katie heartlessly abandoned her boyfriend Sean because she looked down on his lack of wealth. Years later, Sean becomes a young CEO and stands before Katie. He wants her to see her mistake in choosing, but he gradually realizes that the girl before him has actually always loved him.

column1: From Garbage to God-Tier
column4: Roman Shaw is reborn in a world ruled by card draws, only to awaken as a worthless N-Rank Spirit Vessel. Scorned by the academy and facing destruction, his fate changes when Yvette Cole defies everyone to form a pact with him. Now, can this rejected "trash" card rewrite his destiny and become... a legend?

column1: Ultimate Comeback: Bow to Your Dragon King!
column4: Once the hidden master of The Vertice, Arthur Shaw gives up the Ascension to drive a taxi for family. Cast aside with his daughter, he stays silent until the Ascension Conclave turns cruel. When restraint breaks, what will he reclaim, and who will dare face him next?

column1: You Love My Sister? Good Luck!
column4: Laurel is in love with Evan, and they are about to get married. However, Laurel accidentally discovers that Evan has always loved her younger sister Maisie. Heartbroken, she switches marriages with Maisie. Evan discovers the truth on the wedding day and is filled with regret. What will he do?

column1: Work? No, I'm An A-List Slacker!
column4: After overtime work, office drone Mandy Lynn dies from overwork and transmigrates into Demon Lord Shade. Bound to the Malevolent Maiden System, she uses workplace tools and ‘slacker’ logic to resolve crises. With this setup, will she succeed?

column1: Past Life Cancer, This Life Fortune
column4: Zoe, who died of cancer after being abandoned in her past life, is reborn. She resolves to divorce, exposing her husband Liam's lies and her family's schemes. Unexpectedly, Liam and their son Jay are also reborn, but it's too late...

column1: Divorcing Me? I'm Actually a Billionaire!
column4: For five years, a secret billionaire endured humiliation as a worthless son-in-law, all while secretly building his wife's empire. Her reward? Divorcing him for being a failure. But what happens when she discovers the broke loser she just dumped is the most powerful man in the city...?

column1: Bye, Ex! He's My True Love!
column4:
To save her boyfriend, she enters a romance game as the villain, tasked with making the male lead hate her.
Three years of manipulation, a forced wedding, and public betrayal later… she's finally ready to leave.
But if she was only acting, why does his regret feel so real?
And who did she really love all along?

column1: Reaper's Forbidden Vow
column4: Serena survives a suspicious pre-wedding crash. To revive, she must gather three sincere tears in 30 days, or her soul will perish. She uncovers false grief and a deadly plot, while awakening buried memories in a mysterious Reaper tied to her fate. What secret links them, and can they defy heaven to live?

column1: This Time, I'm Protecting My Bodyguard!
column4: Sonia Specter, the secret boss of a powerful organization, returns home to honor her dying grandpa's wish by marrying the unscrupulous Zane Menphis. When her new husband humiliates her and his actions lead to the near-death of her loyal bodyguard, Sonia unleashes her true power, to bring Menphis and his gang to justice.

column1: I Got Promoted With a Billionaire and Triplets!
column4: Olivia Woods, a top finance student from a rural town caring for her mother with Alzheimer’s, struggles in a ruthless workplace. After a fateful encounter with Ethan Holt, her career, heart, and a secret pregnancy are thrown into turmoil, leading to unexpected love and entanglement.

column1: Forty is the New Beginning
column4: Serena Lynn spent her life raising Marcus, only to be murdered by him and his birth parents on her 60th birthday. Reborn at 40, she abandons the ungrateful son and saves billionaire Victor White by chance. But can she rewrite her fate and find true happiness this time?

column1: Reborn to Claim the Cold Prince!
column4: Reborn after betrayal and death, Liana seeks aid from her savior Prince Jeremy to expose her family's schemes. As they confront dangers together, Jeremy falls for her, yet Liana distances herself believing he is betrothed. Through peril, she realizes his true feelings. Can they overcome deceit and forge a shared future?

column1: Bye, Ungrateful Fools, I'm Out!
column4: For 25 years, Selena Lyons gives everything to a family that never chooses her. When she finally walks away, the woman they ignored is reborn, powerful and untouchable. Only then do they realize what they lost. But when regret comes too late, can love still catch up?

column1: The Gods Kicked Me: Now They Kneel!
column4: Louis King used to be a God, but he was betrayed and demoted to a mortal. By accident, he activates the "Landlord System" and inherits an apartment. The Gods discover that the apartment is the only place that can protect them from disaster, so they kneel and beg Louis. Will Louis let them move in? Will the Gods cause any trouble for Louis?

column1: What? 8-Yr-Old Archer IS The Champ!
column4: Jude Thomas was the World Archery Champion, but on the eve of his retirement, he was murdered by his lover, Rosie Harris. Reborn as an eight-year-old boy, Gavin Thomas, he now faces a family in crisis. With his own brothers scheming to seize his fortune and the once-great Thomas legacy in decline, what path will young Gavin choose to take?

column1: (Dubbed) Janitor? No, I'm an Idol!
column4: After a botched ritual swaps faded pop star Diana Jones into the body of Flora Smith, a cleaner in the company of bankrupt CEO Harrison, the two strike a desperate deal. To save his company and find her way back, she must debut as an idol. Their chaotic journey is just beginning.

column1: You Stole My Son? I'll Take Your Empire!
column4: Years after her son was stolen, Cara Grant's life shatters when the culprits return to claim him. She retaliates by exposing their secret marriage and a shocking DNA truth. As a poisoning rocks the family, the true patriarch, Evan Fort, steps in with a revelation that will change everything. In this war of blood and deceit, who will survive?

column1: Janitor? No, I'm an Idol!
column4: After a botched ritual swaps faded pop star Diana Jones into the body of Flora Smith, a cleaner in the company of bankrupt CEO Harrison, the two strike a desperate deal. To save his company and find her way back, she must debut as an idol. Their chaotic journey is just beginning.

column1: Prince Reborn: The Deadly Gamble
column4: Prince Ryan was lost as a child and grew up in brothels and gambling dens. When he returns to the palace, his father despises him for his shameful past, while his adopted brother Evan frames him at every turn. Finally, he falls to Evan's schemes. But he awakens reborn! Can he expose Evan's treachery?

column1: Love Arrived After Goodbye
column4: On the eve of her forced marriage, Lydia believes she’s finally been saved by love—only to learn she’s being used as bait. After her mother’s death, she’s betrayed and nearly sold off. Tycoon Adrian claims her as his girlfriend, but Lydia discovers he loves another. Choosing dignity, she swaps marriages and finds unexpected love with blind Lucien.

column1: Wait! My Secret Lover Is My Royal Fiancé?
column4: Sally, a time-traveling agent, became the minister's legitimate daughter. On her wedding night, she caught Victor cheating with her adopted sister Juliet. By chance, she spent a night with the secretively visiting Crown Prince Luke, who then approached her in disguise as Grayson Lyon while maintaining his princely aloofness. Did Sally find out?

column1: The Son I Lost Is a Business King!
column4:
In 2005, Grace Moore lost three of her four children to human trafficking.
Twenty years later, she survives with her disabled youngest son—until a powerful CEO recognizes her as his mother.
As the siblings reunite, a shocking truth emerges: the traffickers were family.
Blood, betrayal, and justice collide before a long-awaited reunion.

column1: Ex's Revenge? She Came Back with Mini-Me's!
column4: The perfect husband, Julian Hawke, has his life upended when Vivian Wick returns with a secret: a son. She tells him, "You're the one I discarded." But the shock comes when he sees the boy—a mirror image of himself. Now, to win her back, he must first get in line. Will the model father even make the cut?

column1: My DA Daddy, Save My Mommy!
column4: Six years ago, a fire forced pregnant Audrey to fake her death and leave Alex. She raised their daughter Ivy struggling alone—six years later, a work-related injury dispute reunites them. When will Alex realize the child he’s treating so coldly is his daughter?

column1: Lost Memory? Found Vengeance!
column4: Serena Chase lives as the elegant, amnesiac wife of Vincent Brooks. She discovers she is a surgical replica of his murdered first wife. To survive, she must keep pretending while secretly uniting the other women he targets. Together, they turn his control into a trap. In a game of perfect masks, the hunter is about to become the hunted.

column1: My Dead Husband Came Back
column4: A powerful widow takes control of a vast family fortune after her husband dies in a mysterious fire. She ignores the rumors until a man appears at the funeral, claiming to be the rightful heir… and looking exactly like her dead husband. Was he ever really gone? Or has everything she built been a lie?

column1: Move Aside, That's My Mom's Grave!
column4: Sam, having risen to power through the Ford family, was entrusted with his late wife's funeral by his stepdaughter Betty. His secret mistress, Lydia, mistakenly buried her dog in the grave meant for Betty's mother. The confrontation that ensued exposed not only the affair but also the truth that Lydia was the driver who caused the mother's fatal accident...

column1: Ex, Beware: My Bonus Sister Has My Back
column4: Elena spent years as Philip’s substitute, unaware she was the long-lost sister of the formidable Celine. When secrets surface, Celine will stop at nothing to protect her. Amid hidden identities, ruthless rivals, and unexpected love, Elena’s life is about to change forever.

column1: The Woman in My Trunk is My Wife?
column4: Miles Chester, Chairman of the Chester Group, committed a hit-and-run late at night and hid the body, only to realize with shock that the victim may be his missing wife. As he is blackmailed, those around him harbor ulterior motives, plunging everyone into a perilous crisis. Yet, is the victim truly his wife?

column1: What? My Contract Wife is My Kids' Mom!
column4: Six years after a fateful night, Luna Quinn raises twins alone, unaware their father, Shawn Grant, is about to reenter her life through a contract marriage. As sparks fly amid crises and mischievous kids, rival Vivian Linton stirs trouble. Can love survive the secrets and schemes that threaten them all?

column1: Divorced & Unmasked: The AI Queen Rules.
column4: Once a hidden AI genius, Vivian Cross sacrifices everything for the wrong man. After divorce, she gets into a whirlwind marriage with her rival, CEO Vincent Reed. As her technology resurfaces, success follows. Old regrets awaken, new threats close in, and one question remains. Who has truly been standing by her all along?

column1: Married, and He Won't Let Go!
column4: Rumor has it that the man who kneels most for his wife is Leo Vaughn, heir to the Vaughn family. As a child, he swore revenge on Ivy Hale for forcing him to get an injection. Yet years later, they reunite at the marriage office and end up flash-married! How did this happen?!

column1: Hello Again, My Reset Romance
column4: As he breathed his last, Elliot Thorne found his heart donor was Wendy Jones, his childhood sweetheart. In contrast, Vivian Chase, his adored wife, only wanted his wealth. Given the chance to live again, how will he choose his destiny?

column1: (Dubbed)Smart Poor Girl Outwits Rich Kids
column4: Money makes the world turn, and Lydia will do anything to get it. At a prestigious school, she uses her wits to rise above her station. But when another scholarship student shows up, her carefully built life unravels. Surrounded by rich kids forming strange alliances, Lydia discovers the truth: she's the target! What will she do now?

column1: Hired Wives? Now They Want Us!
column4: The Shaw sisters become contract wives to the Stone brothers to win a huge cash prize. The straightforward Winston deals with the playful younger brother, while the talkative Sunny marries the gloomy older brother. When the two sisters get the money and are ready to divorce, the brothers realize they have fallen in love with them. What will they do?

column1: (Dubbed)Exiled Girl Now Rules Criminal World
column4: Scarlett Jones, leader of the top underground force, returns after her father's death. Exiled as a child, she discovers he was murdered by the Third Branch plotting with Crimson Hall to steal the fortune. She storms boardrooms and crushes conspiracies with power that makes even Raven Group's leader kneel. But can she survive the betrayal...?

column1: (Dubbed) Sorry Ex, All You Can Do is Regret!
column4: Betrayed and broken after sacrificing Vivian, Liam is reborn. This time, he aces the entrance exam, reclaiming his own glory. After university, he uses his wit against his vicious superiors and becomes the powerful director's right hand. Liam is now the king of his empire, and Vivian is left with regrets… But will his climb to the top survive the shadows of his past? Adapted from Ta Shang An Hou Ti Fen Shou, Wo Zhuan Shen Cheng Lingdao Mishu on Fanqie Novels, by Yuanming Xiaoyang.

column1: My Ex-Husband is a GOD
column4: Rosy thought she married a useless man, until she divorced him and discovered he was an immortal who built her family's empire, kept her father alive, and only stayed with her to fulfill a dying promise. Now he's gone, the man she thought was a loser is watching from the heavens as everything he gave them vanishes...

column1: Your One and Only Antidote
column4: A yang physique girl with a rare body that can cure poison crosses paths with a cold, powerful billionaire heir suffering from a deadly inherited toxin. One night binds them together, but a cruel misunderstanding tears them apart. When she vanishes carrying his child, he finally learns the truth… Will he find her before fate takes everything away?

column1: My Online BF is An Ancient Warlord?
column4: A 100 years old immortal falls for a modern woman. They meet online. She laughs at his age, he shocks her with real power. When she's in danger, he saves her. But time passes… Ａnd love must face its greatest test.

column1: My Slumdog Billionaire Husband
column4: Molly is killed by her jealous sister over a lucky marriage—then reborn. Her engagement is stolen by her sister, and she’s forced to marry into the slums… only to discover her new husband is a hidden billionaire. As her sister mocks her victory, Molly’s  identity as the billionaire’s wife is revealed—and karma strikes hard.

column1: Reborn as a 5-Year-Old Doomsday Queen
column4: Trapped in an ancient disaster system, a modern woman awakens as a five-year-old girl. To win one hundred billion and return to reality, she must lead her family through famine, plague, cold, and chaos. But as lives are saved and bonds grow, leaving may not be so easy...

column1: Mommy's Revenge: The Bear Is Out
column4: To protect her ailing daughter-in-law, the billionaire matriarch plays dumb. She watches the mistress suffer inside a giant bear suit, waiting for the perfect moment. She doesn't just expose the affair; she evicts the 'bear' from the mansion for good! Witness the ultimate payback as the mistress gets kicked out of the house and out of the family fortune!

column1: I Time-Traveled to Destroy Her Empire!
column4: After transmigrating into a condemned general, a modern man, Carson Gideon, defies the death decree of Empress Leila, rising from betrayal to rebellion and ultimately overturning the throne through cunning political maneuvers.

column1: The AI Queen Returns: Streaming Their Sex Tape
column4: Mary, once cheated of her revolutionary AI tech and betrayed by her fiancé, is reborn on the eve of her life's catastrophe. Armed with knowledge from a past life, she turns her stolen invention and hidden evidence against her betrayers. In a stunning public reversal, she exposes their deceit and reclaims her destiny. Ultimately, she entrusts her true AI creation to the nation, ensuring it serves a greater purpose.

column1: Sorry, I Don't Kiss. I Only Kill.
column4: He is Alvin, the most ruthless killer from the Valley of Villains. Seduced by five deadly beauties? He slapped them unconscious. Offered the world's pleasures? He chose the sword. When the poisoned heroine clutches his leg, begging for help, he pushed her away. But when the arrogant ninjas told him to scram, a deadly glint flashed in his eyes... They just awakened the one man they should never have provoked.

column1: Yikes! Hubby Poisoned Me for Dough!
column4: The top female CEO of Jinx City, Sylvia Scott, unexpectedly catches her so-called perfect husband Jason Green cheating with Rosalie Jones, a college student she’s sponsored for ages. To her further heartbreak, Jason has been poisoning her for a long time to seize the Scott Group’s assets. How will Sylvia fight back?

column1: I Woke Up a GODDESS'S First Love!
column4: Richard lived as a commoner for 3 years to test his girlfriend, Yuna. A misdelivered package exposed her infidelity. He confronted her at a hotel with 3 goddesses who then proposed to him. He accepted, planning a grand wedding. When Yuna and her lover later tried to claim his venue, Richard revealed his true status and humiliated them. More goddesses arrived, declaring their love. Yuna realized her error...

column1: The Wasted Prince: From Zero to Supreme King
column4: Princess Lily of the Torch State, troubled by the marital contest, is deeply disappointed by the seemingly dissolute prodigal son Sam Shaw. However, during the Ruler's test, Sam unexpectedly reveals astonishing strength, sweeps through the competition, and uncovers his hidden identity, catching the princess's heart...

column1: Surprise Visit Exposes Cheating Son's Double Life
column4: Lana Quinn buys a wedding house for her son and daughter-in-law. Excitedly visiting with her best friend, she's blocked at the door by a strange woman hurling insults. Shock turns to horror as Lana realizes this woman is her son's mistress! As the confrontation escalates, buried secrets explode one by one... What else has her son been hiding?

column1: Her Two Sides: Softie vs. Psycho
column4: Kidnapped in her youth, jailed for homicide and then set free, Camille reunites with her affluent biological parents, but she sparks intense conflicts with Cecilia Brown due to identity and interest disputes. Her childhood trauma leads to split personality...Will she eventually overcome this mental illness?

column1: Alzheimer's? My Father Is the God of Design!
column4: They mocked my 'senile' father and stole my design, thinking I was defenseless—until the president knelt before his wheelchair! The 'crazy old man' is actually the legendary National Master! Watch as the villain’s face turns pale, I claim the Gold Medal, and the world finally learns: I am Nora Chase, daughter of the God of Design!"

column1: What? My Only Lifesaver Is Allergic to Females?
column4: After a car accident, Shirley Swift gains the ability to see life countdowns and discovers that Neil Chase, who’s allergic to females, is the only one who can extend her lifespan. To survive, she joins Chase Group and gets close to Neil. Will it work?

column1: Love Mission: Make Her Man Mine
column4: When a billionaire couple hires Anna to seduce their son away from a poor schoolgirl, she discovers her rival is her own step-sister, the one she's been out-scheming since childhood. Now in a battle of wits and charm, only one sister will win the ultimate prize: a billionaire's heart and a life-changing paycheck.

column1: Sorry! The "Loser" is Your Boss Now!
column4: Once mocked for his poverty, Lucien Jenkins rises to rule Peak Garments and returns to Ravenshire as the man everyone envies. A reunion reignites old grudges, secret schemes, and a love that may be built on betrayal. When ambition turns dangerous and loyalties crack, who will stand beside him when everything is on the line?

column1: Hired My Fiancé to Chase Another Guy
column4: To chase her senior, Sophia Jones hires a romance coach for guidance, but mistakenly enlists Henry Swift, a tycoon who is actually her childhood betrothed. Having strived for years to claim her, Henry now finds his fiancée asking him to teach her how to pursue another man. What will he do next?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Enemies to Lovers', 'Sweet Romance']

column1: A Contract Marriage? So what?
column4: A desperate doctor enters a marriage built on lies to save the only family she has left. On her wedding day, she realizes her ruthless groom is the stranger from one reckless night. He knows everything and still chooses her. As a buried murder resurfaces, their fake marriage becomes a dangerous shield. When the truth comes out, can love survive?

column1: No Stand-In: My Way to the Top!
column4: Claire Winslow is a poor student. To pay for her grandmother's medical bills, she signs a contract with a wealthy heir, Jasper Stone, becoming a stand-in for his first love. But Jasper's parents keep making things difficult for her. How will she handle these troubles? And what kind of success will she achieve in her studies?

column1: Ten Millennia: The Grandmaster's Reckoning
column4: Xavier Dawn, a Celestial Sect Grandmaster sealed for ten thousand years, awakens to a world that has forgotten him. Seen as a mere low-level disciple, he must secretly reenter the brutal Hundred-Sect Trial to save his ruined sect. But can a forgotten legend reclaim his power before a demonic threat consumes everything?

column1: My Fate, My Call!
column4: Abandoned heiress Sophia Sterling returns to her family to break a death curse, facing sabotage from her adoptive sister and persecution from her brother. Using arcane spells, she exposes schemes, rewrites her fate...

column1: Smart Poor Girl Outwits Rich Kids
column4: Money makes the world turn, and Lydia will do anything to get it. At a prestigious school, she uses her wits to rise above her station. But when another scholarship student shows up, her carefully built life unravels. Surrounded by rich kids forming strange alliances, Lydia discovers the truth: she's the target! What will she do now?

column1: Beg Me Now? I’m Busy Winning
column4: Elena discovers too late that her husband’s devotion hid a deadly secret. Reborn before the wedding, she demands her price and watches as Ethan sacrifices everything for the wrong person. On the wedding day, she walks away, leaving a choice that could shatter them both… but will he ever realize who truly saved him?

column1: 500 Women Rejected. I Was Chosen.
column4: On her wedding day, Lydia catches her fiancé cheating. Heartbroken, she rebuilds her life and seeks a deal with Aurora Group, unaware its powerful CEO, Albert, has secretly admired her for years. As their chemistry ignites, they must face her vengeful ex and Albert's manipulative fiancée. Will Lydia fall for the CEO who fights for her, or will the past destroy them?

column1: Santa, Please Bring Daddy Home
column4: Seven years ago, she vanished for love and was presumed dead. Now blind and amnesiac, she survives on the streets with their daughter. On Christmas Eve, a ruthless mafia boss meets her selling cigarettes in the snow and unwittingly steps into a seven-year life-and-death lie.  Can love reunite them when bells chime?

column1: The Six-Year-Old Patriarch
column4: The head of the Xavier Family, Wesley Xavier, was poisoned to death by his own kin. He was reborn in the body of a six-year-old child from a later generation, Lane Xavier. Given a second chance at life, can he uncover the murderer who killed him within the vast family?

column1: OMG! My Political Guy Has Loved Me for 8 Years!
column4: Forced into a political marriage, lawyer Faye Ford faces her new husband: the powerful, stoic minister Victor Kane. Their union is one of cold convenience, until she discovers his eight-year secret—a dried yellow rose. As dark conspiracies close in, will this marriage of duty shatter, or become the epic love story it was meant to be?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Sweet Romance', 'Love After Marriage']

column1: Not My Fiancé? He’s Mine Anyway!
column4: Blind and bound by a promise, Lydia believes she has found her destined fiancé. But who protects her and wins her heart isn’t who she believes. When her sight returns, love becomes a forbidden mistake and desire turns dangerous. Can love survive a truth this cruel… or will obsession destroy them both?

column1: (Dubbed) Flash Marriage to My Lady Boss
column4: Aidan is dumped by his girlfriend on their wedding day and quickly marries Flora, the CEO of the Vale Group. What seemed like a peaceful life turns chaotic when Flora suspects Aidan might be the lost heir, Wyatt. As their fates intertwine, Aidan gets caught in family power struggles... What secrets lie beneath this sudden marriage?

column1: You Stole My Life? Meet My Comeback!
column4: Molly steals Lulu’s identity via the Life Swap Program, dooming her to a decade of hell. Lulu comes back as Jenny Carter, dead set on revenge and taking back her life. But will she win it back before Molly’s deadly secret destroys everything?

column1: Say Yes. Or Watch Me Break
column4: Once inseparable orphans, Julian and Erin were torn apart when his wealthy family claimed him and she was forced to vanish. Fifteen years later, a ruthless tycoon collides with a guarded designer. She lies about marriage and a child to push him away. He refuses to let go. Secrets crack, obsession burns… how far will he go to make her stay?

column1: Farewell, I'm the Queen You Don't Deserve
column4: Julia endured betrayal after betrayal from Chris, yet still she offered forgiveness. But when her secret is unveiled as the remarried wife of a powerful tycoon, Chris’s world collapses. He was never the player, only a pawn in her elegant game of revenge. Now, with the crown in her grasp, she turns to him one last time. Will she crush him, or has he already destroyed himself?

column1: His Deadly Savior
column4: What if your savior was your captor? Stella saved Zion from the cages, but his love was a lie. After wiping her memory, he forced a marriage to keep her. As the fog lifts, the truth bleeds through. He’s her husband now, but what happens when she remembers why she left?

column1: Love and Regret at Thirty Thousand Feet
column4: Nancy, CEO of Stone Group, built her husband Ethan’s career from a junior employee to General Manager of Serenity Airlines. However, Ethan secretly gives Nancy’s exclusive Platinum Card to his mistress, Sophia. When Sophia encounters Nancy on a flight and publicly humiliates her, Ethan even forces Nancy to apologize. Little do they know, the true owner of this airline is about to reveal herself…

column1: Survived? I’m More Than Alive
column4: Buried and killed by his rival, the true heir returns possessed by a restless spirit. Driven by vengeance, he exposes the lies, confronts the family who abandoned him, and hunts the impostor Chad. But can a soul trapped between life and death truly finish what it started?

column1: (Dubbed) Her Baby's Father Is A She?
column4: Black has always been a girl with a boyish look. One day, her brother Zane calls her to the school office. The reason is Vivian insists she is pregnant and says Black is the father. With no way out, Black simply says she'll marry her! What happens next is anyone's guess.

column1: Three Hours to Save My Boy
column4: Violet is reborn three hours before her son Ben freezes to death in a deadly cold wave. In her past life, her father-in-law Derek left Ben in the car. Now history repeats. She warns her family about the freeze, but they accuse her of lying and mock her nonstop. Violet smashes the frozen car with bare hands. But is it too late?

column1: Sorry Ex, All You Can Do is Regret!
column4: Betrayed and broken after sacrificing Vivian, Liam is reborn. This time, he aces the entrance exam, reclaiming his own glory. After university, he uses his wit against his vicious superiors and becomes the powerful director's right hand. Liam is now the king of his empire, and Vivian is left with regrets… But will his climb to the top survive the shadows of his past? Adapted from Ta Shang An Hou Ti Fen Shou, Wo Zhuan Shen Cheng Lingdao Mishu on Fanqie Novels, by Yuanming Xiaoyang.

column1: Save her Daughter Into the Living Hell!
column4: Lily Mercer ventured alone into the notorious Baydan Park, an overseas fraud park, carrying a large sum of money to rescue her kidnapped daughter, Cole Mercer. Relying on her exceptional courage and wit, she clawed her way up from the bottom ranks to the management level... Would she ultimately succeed in saving her daughter?

column1: See You in Hell, My Love
column4: Selena, the chosen one, summons the Netherworld King Silas to avenge her adopted sister's crimes. Bound by unholy matrimony, she defeats her enemy, but when she tries breaking their contract, Silas's obsessive pursuit melts her heart. Just as she accepts him as her husband, she discovers every moment was part of his meticulously crafted scheme...

column1: What? My “Idiot” Wife is a Secret Master!
column4:
Quentin Lynch, a literature doctoral student, transmigrates as the concubine's son of Lynch Manor. After his mother's murder, he is forced into marriage with the Quinns, wedding their dumb daughter. Secretly, he trains in martial arts under a mysterious woman. But who's she indeed?
Adapted from the novel by Yichan Zhixia.

column1: Say "Good Night", Babe
column4: For twenty years, she didn’t speak, not because she couldn’t, but because no one listened. Now her daughter is back… And this time, she won’t let the world look away.

column1: Her Fate Was Written. She Says No!
column4: NPC Serena Johnson unexpectedly gains self-awareness and finds herself in the Script World. To save Arthur Scott, her adoptive grandfather, she defies the Book Spirit, tears up the original plot, and travels back to her 18th year. Did she manage to save her grandfather in the end?

column1: Ms. Gambler's Double Life
column4: Joy's father was once a legend, but he was betrayed and killed. While Joy mastered the art of the counter-con abroad, her sister Serena stayed to protect the family empire. Eight years later, Joy returns to find Serena dead and her brother-in-law under suspicion. Assuming her sister's identity, Joy enters a deadly game of high-stakes deception. Can she unmask the killer before her own mask slips?

column1: How to Train Your Dragon King
column4: Griffin, secretly the legendary Dragon King, Gryphon, returns to Cloudhaven, wielding unmatched power and influence. Sherry, captivated by Gryphon and dreaming of a life beside him, does not know his true identity. As Griffin hunts his father’s killers, alliances and secrets collide leaving love and revenge hanging in the balance…

column1: Bye, Fallen Empress! I Run the Palace Now!
column4: A modern HR director wakes up as a disgraced Empress, abandoned by both the emperor and the harem. No favor. No mercy. She runs the palace like a business. Rules are rewritten. Secrets exposed. Power shifts fast. When the court fights back, who will fall first?

column1: The Rose That Came Back to Burn
column4: In the world of old money and colder hearts, one woman walks into the lion’s den, not as a guest, but as a reckoning. The Langstons think they know who she is. They’re wrong… She returned not to beg for love. But to take back what was hers. And this time… She won’t be silenced.

column1: Reborn: My Uncle's New Obsession
column4: Celia was killed by husband Adrian in her past life. Reborn to that fateful day, she rejects Adrian and marries his uncle Nathan instead. Everyone says Nathan is impotent, but Celia has triplets and he spoils her endlessly. Will she escape her tragic past... or repeat it?

column1: 6 Years in Hiding, 1 Day for Revenge
column4: Six years ago, Stella Shaw was betrayed by her sister Iris and left to die. Miraculously, she survived and gave birth alone. Now living in secret with her son, her hope to reunite with Emperor Leo is shattered when Iris imprisons her. With time running out, Leo must race to save his true love and reclaim their family before it’s too late.

column1: My Wife is Cheating… with a Chair!
column4: Zack's perfect marriage is falling apart, and the homewrecker isn't human. It's a high-tech massage chair. Obsessed with her new "comfort object," his wife, Rachel, now rejects his touch, preferring its cold, mechanical embrace. Convinced he's losing her to a machine, Zack's desperate investigation uncovers a terrifying secret hidden within the chair's circuits... What if it was designed to steal more than just back pain?

column1: Fool My Daughter? You’re Done!
column4: After years abroad, Richard Blake comes home to reward his devoted son-in-law, only to run into his daughter's secret lover, a con man after her money. Planning payback at his welcome banquet, Richard is humiliated by the arrogant man again. Hiding his identity, he lets the trap tighten... How long can the lie survive?

column1: Zero to Hero: My Sword Path
column4: Sent down the mountain to honor a forgotten marriage pact, Gilbert Quinn arrives as a man everyone in the martial world misjudges. Clans sneer, sects provoke, rivals close in. One by one, they learn the cost of contempt. When the underdog finally moves, who will still dare stand in his way…

column1: OMG! A Guard is The Hottest Catch?
column4: When security guard Peter fixed a pipe for Jessica, he accidentally activated a system: win her heart, gain superpowers and fortunes. He began to protect her, solve her problems. But while playing his role, he truly fell in love. Now was it the system's mission… or his heart's true choice?

column1: My Husband's Secret Wedding
column4: On the eve of her thirtieth wedding anniversary, Clara discovers her husband proposing to his longtime crush, Chloe. Forced to accept a "fake wedding", she exposes Chloe's fabricated hospital record at the ceremony, turning the meticulously planned event into a feast of lies and truth...

column1: (Dubbed) Village Girl Nails The Cursed CEO!
column4: In a village where women bear multiple births, Hazel is sent to the city as her family's last hope. Forced to marry the cold, heir-seeking CEO Lucas Stone, she must now survive in a world of luxury and deceit. When her husband refuses to cooperate, how far will Hazel go to secure her future—and claim her own victory?

column1: The Dead Wife Returns
column4: Lane Lewis was buried alive on her birthday by her husband Mason and bestie Mia. She survived the nightmare, rescued by Caleb, a mysterious farmer. Now, believing she is dead, the traitors prepare to seize her empire. But Lane is back, and she’s ready to crash their party. With Caleb hiding a shocking secret of his own, the stage is set for a brutal takedown. Will Lane get her revenge, or is a deadly trap waiting?

column1: Where Past Fades, Love Departs
column4: After dying from betrayal, Mary is reborn on the day she's chosen to marry into the Holt family. She soon realizes her husband is also reborn. Choosing to leave, she's still targeted by schemes meant to ruin her. When Tom extends a partnership offer, Mary accepts, using her past-life experience to help build his company into an empire...

column1: Confess to the Campus Beauty or Die!
column4: Ordinary college student Richard Lynn is bound to a deadly "Confession System." To survive, he must pursue campus beauty Yvette Stevens and complete impossible tasks such as stealing a first kiss and confessing in public. With his life on the line, one question remains: how will Yvette react?

column1: (Dubbed) OMG! The "butcher" Son Is the Family Savior!
column4: Aiden Storm comes down from the mountain to find his birth parents. He saves Zara from an attack, drawn into a feud. In Mira, he finds a connection, but his father Damon calls him worthless. When his new family is threatened, he must unleash his power. How far will he go to protect them?

column1: Captain, Your Wife Is Already Gone
column4:
Marriage on life support, betrayal after a crash.
After a plane accident, Nora Vale watches her husband choose his first love and gives up everything she once was. As she walks away and reclaims her true identity, he finally sees the truth. But when regret turns into sacrifice, will it be too late to win her back?

column1: Long Lost Girl? Divine Queen!
column4: Mira Shaw, a fallen goddess, spent a decade building a modern empire. To return home, she must finish her mortal life's tasks. But upon arriving, she finds her parents being humiliated. Enraged, she leads them to fight back. The villains are furious? Too bad. They're facing a god they can't defy.

column1: My Family Begs Me to Inherit!
column4: June Shane is the first daughter in eighteen generations of the Shane dynasty. A "Lucky Charm" with uncanny intuition, she turns every family business into gold. Her brothers beg her to take the throne, but June just wants a normal life. As a storm gathers, will her luck save her—or is there a price?

column1: The Hands that Raised Me Killed My Dad
column4: Nina goes to Port City alone to find her missing brother. By chance, she saves the seriously injured heir of a wealthy family, Adrian. In a desperate moment, she steals his expensive watch to trade for clues. But this drags her into the Sterling family's bloody power struggle...

column1: Taming My Lord Husband
column4: Zara is the perfect wife from a noble family. But her new husband has a favorite concubine and a scheming sister-in-law. He thinks she's too proper and boring. No problem. She'll learn their games, take control of the house, and secure her power. And then… she'll deal with her husband next.

column1: You're My Only Cure
column4: In rebellion against a forced marriage, Vivian's life collides with Allen’s, a man with secret ailment. Pregnant and betrayed by family, she is stripped of her mother's last legacy and driven to the edge of despair. Just as violence threatens to destroy her, he breaks through... a rescuer who becomes her shelter. But can a love forged in brokenness survive the sharp realities still waiting in the shadows?

column1: No Entry for the Unblessed
column4: In a humiliating case of mistaken identity, the CEO’s first love scorns his mother, who works incognito as a cleaner, only to recoil in shock after realizing she insulted the very woman whose approval she needed.

column1: Trash Sis, You Belong with My Husband!
column4: Murdered by her sister, Sayuri wakes up in the past, only to find her sister Hikari stealing the billionaire husband in her last life, while she marries a seemingly penniless security guard, yet the secret heir to the most powerful family. In a glittering world of wealth and lies, their fierce battle for love, legacy, and ultimate triumph begins.

column1: My Useless Daughter is A Grand General?
column4: Liana disguises as a man to replace her ailing father, Lord Quinn, in defending Veridia. Celebrated as General Stormwing, she dies in battle, only to be disgraced by her father who doesn't know the truth. Later, she's reborn as the Princess of Montclair. Returning with memories and facing her remorseful father, what choice will she make?

column1: Cross Miss Hardcore? Doom Awaits!
column4: After rebirth, Miss Hardcore, Marina, revealed her decisive and ruthless nature. She punished the malicious servants, defied her elder brother Sylas Barton without mercy, and repeatedly uncovered the sinister plots woven by her younger sister Cecilia Barton. Did they cease tormenting Marina?

column1: Fired Genius Takes Company's Only Hope
column4: Vivian creates the Celestial Logistics System that could revolutionize the company. But the boss's wife, poisoned by rumors, publicly humiliates her on signing day. Betrayed by her assistant and cornered by security, Vivian quits for rival Pinnacle Group. Now the boss's wife demands the system password... but can the company survive without her?

column1: Reborn at 9: I Saved the Plane!
column4: Emma was the nation's top female captain and chief engineer. After dying in duty, she's reborn as nine-year-old Naomi! When her flight suffers an engine explosion and cockpit depressurization, this child uses her past life expertise to land the plane from 30,000 feet. But fame brings enemies... Can a nine-year-old prove her skills against doubters?

column1: Bully Me? My Three Brothers Are Watching!
Gofer Van? Legend Dane!
column4: A dead basketball prodigy. A soul transfer to a nobody teen. From Dane to Van, he rebuilds the Murphy Crew, outdunks the ruthless Walker Crew, and exposes league corruption at every step. Can this reborn baller dominate the Planetary Basketball Tournament and avenge his past?

column1: He Learned Too Late. Or Did He?
column4: After escaping a gilded cage with a staged death, Zoey is reborn as Aurora and dares to love again. But when the ruthless Cyrus finds her, old obsessions, a deadly double, and buried sins resurface. Betrayal closes in, blood is spilled, and love demands a final price. Is this reunion salvation… or the most dangerous trap of all?

column1: My Bodyguard, My Sweetheart
column4: Arthur saved Haley in Holland, and she became his guardian. Being attacked abroad, Arthur returned home feigning weakness to investigate his mother's missing. But his half-brother Tom's attempts to seize the family legacy. With the help of his beloved girl, he uncovers a conspiracy that goes deeper than he imagined...

column1: My Cook Father is A Martial Master?
