column4: Rescued from bandits by Martial God John Miller and Boxing King Arthur Hale, Robert Son bonded with them over his cooking, trained for four years, and grew nearly as strong as his mentor. But when he joined the Five Peaks Sect Trial with his son, why does everyone mock him?

column1: Village Girl Nails The Cursed CEO!
column4: In a village where women bear multiple births, Hazel is sent to the city as her family's last hope. Forced to marry the cold, heir-seeking CEO Lucas Stone, she must now survive in a world of luxury and deceit. When her husband refuses to cooperate, how far will Hazel go to secure her future—and claim her own victory?

column1: Married For Money? But He Owned My Job!
column4: Juliet Grant marries lawyer Charles Mitchell to secure her mother's fortune. She doesn't know he's been obsessed with her for years. He secretly buys her firm, becoming her boss. As office spouses, they grow close—until she discovers his decade-long secret. Is she the true object of his desire, or merely a replacement for another?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Flash Marriage', 'Love After Marriage']

column1: Kid Doctor? True Miracle Savior!
column4: After his daughter's murder, Doctor Walter sealed his meridians in grief. Reborn as a child, he must wield his past-life mastery and the art of the needles to protect his sister, navigate vicious family strife, and expose a conspiracy, all to reclaim his legacy and become a legend once more.

column1: Spy vs. Spy: Oops, We’re Married
column4: Bickering spouses Meg and Max hide bombshell secrets. The doting wife is top FTD agent, Moon. The target Max’s been hunting nonstop is her. Their kid’s the only one clued in, scrambling to cover for her parents as a conspiracy blows their covers wide open. Who’s setting them up? Can this spy couple survive when their deadly mix-up goes public?

column1: Billionaire's Wife? Nah, I’m After a Stable Job!
column4: Amy Bell, a university student focused on her career, accidentally ends up as the love interest in a melodramatic story. To change her fate, she breaks off her engagement with her cheating fiancé and targets the wealthy Alex Hughes. As he falls for her, she exposes a college exam scam, proving her worth while balancing love and career.
column5: ['Rich Family Feud', 'Trapped in a Book', 'Sweet Romance']

column1: Fools in Love, Victims of Revenge
column4:
Robbed, humiliated, and left with his mom dead after a wedding day disaster, Connor is reborn one week earlier.
He lures his greedy ex’s family into a 50 million dollar trap, making them borrow and splurge like there’s no tomorrow. Midnight wedding bells chime. A new bride shows up. And this revenge plot? It’s only the beginning.

column1: My Baby's Daddy is a Cat God!
column4: Serena is drugged by her father and brother and given to the Cat God Zane. This causes her to lose her virginity, and she gives birth to a daughter named Eva. After learning the truth, Serena hates Zane. But to help cure Eva's illness, Serena meets Zane again. This time, can they clear up their misunderstandings?

column1: Framed by Family? Time for Payback!
column4: In a chaotic era, Elara is betrayed by her own family and cast into prison. At death's door, she awakens an ancient power, the ability to rewrite life and death with a single stroke of her brush. Now, the woman they left to die has returned. And she will paint their world in the colors of their deepest regrets.

column1: THE ALPHA'S KEPT WOMAN
column4: When the Alpha of the rogue pack Alex Phelan can’t conceive an heir, he pays a virgin human Meg Lowell to be his secret surrogate to secure his and his wife’s status. Twelve years later, with his wife dead, Meg is hired to be the tutor for their daughter the spoiled Luna Princess. If Meg is revealed to be the mother of the tween, both Alex and his now illegitimate daughter will be shunned from society and lose everything, but can Meg and Alex resist their feral attraction to each other?

column1: A Mother Who Strikes Back
column4: Powerful matriarch, broken family, ruthless betrayal. After years abroad, Zhang Qinglan returns to find her son cheating with a maid’s daughter and driving his pregnant wife out. When the truth turns even darker, she makes a choice no mother should have to make. But surrender is only the beginning… Who will she destroy first?!

column1: CEO in Danger: Her Guard’s Actually a Legend
column4:
Leo Carter, a security guard, gains godlike powers from the Ultimate Alias System and becomes the bodyguard of beautiful CEO Linda Snow. But her evil sister Ariana Moore, after framing her for murder, sends hitmen to finish the job.
When Linda's life hangs in the balance, Leo must use his hidden identity to save the woman he loves. Can he protect her from the Black Tiger Gang and its ruthless leader? The final showdown is coming!

column1: You Messed With the Tycoon's Mother!
column4: Liana visits a resort owned by her son Jacob Howell's R&J Group, accompanied by her grandson Riley. During their stay, they encounter impostors, which leads to a confrontation. Gina, Jacob's fiancée, and the resort manager arrive and mistakenly humiliate them. But when Jacob arrives, would it be too late to beg for forgiveness?

column1: Sorry Sis, You're the $9.9 Bride!
column4: Reborn on her wedding day, Julia smiled at the plastic bouquet offered by Kathy, the nanny's daughter. In her past life, a moment of weakness cost her a priceless jade bouquet, her fiancé, her brother, and her life. Now, she clutches her grandfather's masterpiece, her eyes gleaming with ice... This time, she'll take it all back!

column1: (Dubbed) Healing Hands and Avenging Wife
column4:
Reborn at her forced wedding, Shannon Young refuses her tragic end. She chooses to marry Arthur Xavier instead of Silas Shaw.
With her innate gift for healing, she cures Arthur. Together, they face schemes from Lucia Frost and her own past.
But in this new life, will her choice lead to salvation, or a different kind of ruin?

column1: (Dubbed) Too Late: His Stand-In Wife Is Gone
column4: For years, Lily loved Arthur, only to find she was merely a stand-in for his stepsister. After a brutal betrayal, she leaves and meets Theo, the powerful man who’s loved her since youth. Just as she accepts him, Arthur returns in regret. Two men. One choice. Who will win her heart?

column1: Retired Lovers Under Siege
column4: Shane and Yvonne trade bloodshed for a quiet coastal life. Love, marriage and a baby on the way. But her former syndicate sends four killer to silence them. She fights alone to protect her husband, but he's actually the world's deadliest warrior. When Yvonne's life is on the line, will Shane unsheathe his blade? The ultimate showdown ignites!

column1: Love, Lies, and Christmas Surprise
column4: After 20 years underground, secret billionaire Mark catches his wife Emily taking her ex Jamie to bed on Christmas Eve—and his kids even side with the new lover! Humiliated and cast out into the cold on Christmas Eve, Mark is finally done hiding. Now, the ruthless reckoning begins.

column1: Pretend Weak, Hunt Deep
column4: On the day he mourns his parents, Theo hears the truth for the first time. Betrayal, lust, and a fatal secret surface behind his perfect marriage. He chooses silence as a weapon, staging love, wealth, and loyalty into a deadly game. When the board meets, who will fall…and who is really pulling the strings?

column1: Too Late to Call Her Mom
column4: Rowan vanished from the throne of wealth to raise an abandoned boy in silence. Twenty five years later, on the day meant to crown him heir, strangers crash the wedding claiming blood ties and branding Rowan a thief. Betrayal cuts deeper than knives. When the tycoon returns and the past strikes back, will truth arrive before regret does…

column1: Eyes Don't Lie, Daddy
column4: A hotel waitress's fateful night with a CEO left her with twins who share his unique eyes. Five years later, his powerful family uses every cruel scheme, from fake DNA tests to kidnapping, to deny them. In a world built on lies, can the undeniable truth in their eyes unite a family torn apart by greed and betrayal?

column1: (Dubbed) My Ex's Uncle... Is Obsessed With Me?
column4: After seven years together, Charlotte Sanders is stunned when her fiancé trades her to his powerful CEO uncle, Sebastian Shaw, in a bid for funding. Instead of rejecting her, Sebastian marries her. What starts as an unexpected union soon turns into a love she never saw coming...

column1: CEO SAUL'S LOVE AFTER VOWS
column4: Tech CEO Saul hides his identity when he marries money-saving Rachel, who thinks he’s a “scammer.” Their hilarious contract marriage blossoms into real love, proving that the biggest happiness can be found in the smallest home.

column1: Ex-Girlfriend Wants Back? No Way!
column4: On the wedding day, Cole is left heartbroken when his girlfriend Iris abandons him for another man. At this time, Wendy appears. She is pregnant with Cole's child. Later, Iris comes back with regret. Why did she come back? And how will Cole choose between them?

column1: Whoa! Janitor Dad Is A Big Shot!
column4: Zachary Chase, Grand Master of Titan Group, disguises himself as a cleaner. By chance, he rescues Yulia Harris, CEO of Rastar Group, from the drugging trap set by Mr. Weston. The following day, he honors his son’s request to attend a blind date, only to be subjected to unwarranted harassment. Yulia intervenes...

column1: Sister! No One Hurts You with Me Around!
column4: Clara Sinclair uncovers a devastating secret. The sister she raised for 16 years is not blood, while the true heiress, Iris Sinclair, was switched at birth and abused far from home. As Clara brings the timid Iris back and helps her rise, traps and betrayals close in. When the enemy is revealed from within the family, can Clara protect Iris before the truth destroys them all?

column1: Careful! My Fiancé Has X-Ray Eyes!
column4: Born with the power of X-Vision, Noah descends into the modern world with one goal: to find Amelia, the fiancée he never met. Only through their union can he unlock his divine power. But Amelia sees not a destined husband, only a total pervert. Provoked by her contempt, Noah decides to prove himself and win her heart… even if it brings chaos to the world.

column1: Unmask Ms. Calculated with My Alpha Daddy!
column4: Nila Tyler, Javon Lucas's fiancée, driven by her obsession with marrying into wealth, mistook Marina, her future stepdaughter, for a rival and assaulted her violently. Foiled initially, Nila escalated her madness by orchestrating Marina's abduction. How will Javon, who cherishes his daughter above all else, respond to such unforgivable acts?

column1: My Stepsisters Spoiled Me into a Legend
column4: Top scholar Cedric White's own family murdered him and gave his honor to his worthless brother. Reborn, he abandons his toxic mother and sisters, following his father into the Moore family instead. Suddenly three stunning sisters are fighting to pamper him! They call him their treasure, their pride, their everything. From death to devotion, from hatred to heaven. Will Cedric's new life be the paradise he never had, or another nightmare in disguise...?
